creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
makc        2010-05-19 20:43:02 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    audio/tepsonic       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    audio/tepsonic/files 
                         patch-player-collections-collectionbuilder.cpp 
                         patch-player-player.cpp 
                         patch-player-playlist-playlistmodel.cpp 
  Log:
  Add new port audio/tepsonic:
  
  TepSonic is a simple and fast audio player but it has all the basic functions
  that every good audio player should have. TepSonic is not trying to be
  like Amarok or Banshee, it stays small and simple.
  
  WWW:    http://www.tepsonic.org/
  
  PR:             ports/146700
  Submitted by:   Gvozdikov Veniamin <g.veniamin at googlemail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/audio/tepsonic/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/audio/tepsonic/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +15 -0     ports/audio/tepsonic/files/patch-player-collections-collectionbuilder.cpp (new)
  1.1       +15 -0     ports/audio/tepsonic/files/patch-player-player.cpp (new)
  1.1       +15 -0     ports/audio/tepsonic/files/patch-player-playlist-playlistmodel.cpp (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/audio/tepsonic/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/audio/tepsonic/pkg-plist (new)
